name: hex-htmltoimg

metadata.name: hex-htmltoimg
metadata.summary: A module to generate images from HTML content

documentation:
# hex_htmltoimg

`hex_htmltoimg` is a Python module that allows you to generate images from HTML files. It enables customization of the image size and supports dynamic content replacement within the HTML by using placeholders. The module integrates `html2image` for rendering HTML into images and `Pillow` for image manipulation.

## Features

- Convert HTML files to images
- Replace placeholders in HTML with dynamic content
- Specify custom image dimensions (width and height)
- Generate a unique filename for each image
- Resize images to specified dimensions

## Installation

To install the module, use `pip`:

```bash
pip install hex_htmltoimg

functions.name: hex_htmltoimg.hex_htmltoimg.generate_unique_filename
documentation: Generate a unique alphanumeric filename with all uppercase characters and digits.

functions.name: hex_htmltoimg.hex_htmltoimg.generate_image_from_html
documentation: Generate an image from an HTML file with specified dimensions, replacing placeholders.
